Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ana Damonte, Esq. of Pillsbury, 415-983-1013 for palintiff and moving party California Bank and Trust
Robert Staley, Esq. of Epstein, Englert, Stalet & Coffey, 415-398-6392 for defendant and opposing party Tom Gonzales and TG Investments

Ruling:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED AND The Court MODIFIED AND CLAIFIED its tentative ruling:
PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BANK & TRUST, A CALIFORNIA BANKING Motion Of Plaintiff For Order: (1) Compelling Attendance And Testimony Of Defendants TG Investments, LLC And Tom Gonzales At Deposition; And (2) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants TG Investments, LLC And Tom Gonzales WAS HEARD AT 9:00AM ON DISCOVERY CALENDAR WITH LINE 1.
MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION - GRANTED. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR FOR DEPO AS TO PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE AND TOM GONZALEZ NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 10, 2010. SANCTIONS AWARDED IN AMOUNT OF $1,000 ON EACH MOTION V. TG INVESTMENTS TLC & T. GONZALES. Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/PHA)
